name: story-viewer-01
title: Story Viewer 01
author: ilinxa
description: Full-screen sequential story viewer — Radix Dialog modal with segmented progress, tap zones, multi-story nav arrows, keyboard nav, accumulator-based pause-preserving timer (fixes kasder's pause drift), ID-anchored cursor (insertion-stable), Subscribe<StoryViewerDelta> realtime contract, video-player-01 composition for video items, renderItem slot. Forward-only onStoryViewed semantics (matches Instagram). Always-uncontrolled with reset() + dispatch() + goToStory/goToItem/setPaused imperative escape hatches. v0.1 ships pure CSS animations; framer-motion swipe-to-dismiss is the locked v0.2 adoption gate. Eighth (and final) ship in the social-posts-system arc.
